title: PlatformLanguage
description: Platform-owned catalogue of BCP 47 locale tags this platform supports. Formerly `Language` (Wave 5 pre-release). REFERENCES `geography::Language` (ISO-639 base) + optionally `geography::Country` (regional variant) instead of duplicating those fields. Adds platform-specific state: BCP 47 composition, script code, active-on-platform toggle, beta flag, picker sort order. Workspaces enable rows via `WorkspaceLocale`. Table renamed from `languages` → `platform_languages` to eliminate the collision with the vendor-owned `languages` table (`nnjeim/world`).

x-eloquent.relations_note: `geographyLanguage()` belongsTo geography::Language via geography_language_id. `geographyCountry()` belongsTo geography::Country via geography_country_id (nullable). `name` / `native_name` / `direction` accessors read from the joined geography language. `flag_emoji` accessor reads from the joined geography country (regional variant) OR null (base language).

x-database.description: Table renamed from `languages` to `platform_languages` to eliminate collision with the vendor-owned `languages` table shipped by `nnjeim/world` (geography module). Reference fields are removed and replaced with FKs to geography::languages + geography::countries. The migration ships a fresh CREATE TABLE + seeder for platform-specific state only; ISO-639 + ISO-3166 rows are entirely owned by `nnjeim/world`.

geography_language_id.description: FK to `geography::Language.id` (vendor row from nnjeim/world). Source of truth for iso_639_1, name, native, dir, is_rtl. Cannot be null — every platform language must trace to a canonical ISO-639 row.

geography_country_id.description: FK to `geography::Country.id`. Populated ONLY for regional variants (`fr-CA` → Canada, `en-GB` → United Kingdom, `pt-BR` → Brazil). NULL for base languages that span many countries (English, French, Spanish base rows).

bcp47_code.description: BCP 47 language tag. Composed from geography_language.code + optional script + optional geography_country.iso2. Examples: `en`, `en-GB`, `fr`, `fr-CA`, `zh`, `zh-Hans`, `zh-Hans-HK`, `ar`, `ar-EG`. Lowercase language + optional Titlecase script + optional UPPERCASE region.

script_code.description: ISO 15924 four-letter script code. `Latn`, `Arab`, `Cyrl`, `Hans` (Simplified Chinese), `Hant` (Traditional Chinese), `Deva` (Devanagari). Independent of geography_country_id — a language may have multiple script variants targeting the same country (`sr-Cyrl-RS` vs `sr-Latn-RS`). Absent from geography catalogue — this is the ONE field genuinely additive over the vendor row.

is_active_on_platform.description: Platform-level enable toggle. False hides from workspace pickers even if a workspace previously enabled it. Preserved on soft-delete.

is_beta.description: Surfaces a 'translation completeness < 90%' warning banner. Platform admins mark languages beta until enough keys are translated.

is_system.description: From HasSystemFlag. Platform-seeded rows can be disabled but not deleted by tenants.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in picker UIs. Common languages get low values (English=1, Arabic=5, French=10).

notes.description: Platform ops notes. Not shown to workspaces.

indexes.name: platform_languages_bcp47_unique
indexes.description: One platform row per BCP 47 tag.

indexes.name: platform_languages_composite_unique
indexes.description: One platform row per (base ISO-639 language, optional country region, optional script) combination. Also protects against duplicate BCP 47 constructions.

indexes.name: platform_languages_picker_idx
indexes.description: Fast scan for the workspace-facing picker list.

indexes.name: platform_languages_geo_language_idx
indexes.description: JOIN acceleration on the reverse direction (given a geography language, find all platform variants).

geography_country_id.description: FK to geography::Country.id. Null for base languages.

native_name.description: Computed. Native-script name from geography::Language.native (e.g. `Français`, `中文`, `العربية`).

direction.description: Computed. Derived from geography::Language.is_rtl or dir.

flag_emoji.description: Computed. From geography::Country.emoji for regional variants; null for base languages (which span many countries).

display_label.description: Computed. E.g. `English (US)` or `العربية` (native) or `Français (Canada)` — formatted per caller locale.

migration_notes.prior_shape: Older `Language` schema at `academorix://modules/localization/schemas/language` (deleted this pass) carried duplicated ISO-639 + ISO-3166 fields (code, iso_639_1, iso_639_3, name, native_name, direction, script_code, country_code as plain string, flag_emoji, is_system, is_active_on_platform, is_beta, sort_order, notes, metadata).

column_notes.code \u2192 bcp47_code: Renamed for clarity. Same purpose (BCP 47 tag).
column_notes.country_code (plain 2-letter string): Replaced by `geography_country_id` FK. Old free-text integrity gap closed.
column_notes.flag_emoji: Dropped. Computed accessor reads `geographyCountry->emoji` when a regional variant is set.

migration_notes.seed_direction: Seeder inserts one row per platform-active BCP 47 tag with the correct geography_language_id + optional geography_country_id resolved by lookup against the vendor-seeded geography rows.
